title: Stage 2 load shedding implemented
bodyText:
LOAD-SHEDDING NEWS - Eskom has announced Stage 2 load shedding from 16:00 today, 24 April.

Eskom said in a post on X: "Despite significant progress in our generation recovery efforts, higher-than-expected electricity demand, the loss of generation units, and extensive planned maintenance have placed strain on the system."


> Stage 2 load shedding will be implemented from 16:00 today and will remain in effect until 05:00 tomorrow, 25 April.


"Given these ongoing constraints, we urge the public to use electricity sparingly to help reduce pressure on the grid.   Eskom sincerely apologises for the inconvenience and will continue to provide updates as necessary."

Receive Eskom load shedding notifications by downloading the free EskomSePush app from Google Play Store.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
